PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?secondRider ?label WHERE {
  wd:Q242823 wdt:P19 wd:Q7003 .
  wd:Q242823 p:P1532 ?stmt1 .
  ?stmt1 pq:P1545 "1" ; pq:P641 wd:Q1997344 ; pq:P701 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P361 wd:Q194472 .
  ?secondRider p:P1532 ?stmt2 .
  ?stmt2 pq:P1545 "2" ; pq:P641 wd:Q1997344 ; pq:P701 ?season .
  ?secondRider rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 1

Index types used:
- "embedding": Retrieves items by cosine similarity between their embeddings and the query embedding. The embedding model used depends on the index and may support text, images, or both.
- "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed.
